title: avenula pubescens subsp. longifolia
intro: Avenula pubescens subsp. longifolia, also known as Long-leaved Velvet-grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The Long-leaved Velvet-grass is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
